_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — not active. To enable Phase 1 (companion-to-one), a HUMAN copies this to <data-dir>/boundary.json (default familiar_data/boundary.json) and edits the paths. The familiar only reads boundary.json; it can never write or widen it. Remove the file (or set everything false/empty) to return to CLOSED. See docs/boundaries.md.
_gates: each is a separate human choice. allow_execute runs the familiar's own (deterministic) artifacts; allow_authored_execute runs LLM-WRITTEN code — a real exfiltration surface the in-process runner does not sandbox, so leave it off unless you accept that risk.
